title: Audit main-thread work and permissions
description: Inspect for blocking calls on the UI thread and for dangerous-API use lacking a runtime permission request.
body: Use when reviewing responsiveness and permission hygiene. Actions: scan for synchronous network/disk/database/heavy work on the main thread (calls not dispatched to a background coroutine) and for dangerous-permission APIs invoked without a manifest declaration and runtime request/denial handling. Report each main-thread block and unguarded permission use with location. Do not modify code. This skill exposes capability only and must not access protected data without runtime permission. Validation signals include all I/O off-main and a request flow guarding every dangerous API. Risk boundary: main-thread I/O (ANR risk) and unguarded dangerous-API calls (SecurityException) are blocking findings; recommend coroutine offloading and an in-context permission flow rather than shipping them.
